comment:
header_generator.zig — File header comment generation for guidance.

 Generates `//!`-style module doc comments for Zig source files.
 These replace the `detail` field in JSON files as the authoritative
 source of module-level documentation.

members.name: generateFileHeader
members.signature: fn generateFileHeader(allocator: std.mem.Allocator, rel_path: []const u8, members: []const types.Member, source_preview: []const u8) -> ?[]const u8

members.name: insertFileHeader
members.signature: fn insertFileHeader(allocator: std.mem.Allocator, source: []const u8, header: []const u8) -> []const u8
